subject: [PATCH 10/10] nfsd: validate symlink target length in NFSv4 CREATE

2026-05-28.patch_summary: This patch fixes a security vulnerability in the NFSv4 CREATE operation by validating the length of symlink targets to prevent a client from forcing an unbounded kmalloc allocation. The patch rejects oversized targets and returns an error code early, preventing the allocation from occurring. This fix addresses a long-standing issue that was introduced in Linux 2.6.12-rc2.
